summary: Spin Wheel feature testing complete. 9/9 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working: FAB button visible at bottom-right, modal opens correctly, canvas-based wheel renders with 9 colored segments, spin button present with appropriate state, prize legend displays all 9 prizes. The 24h cooldown is properly enforced.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/spin-wheel/status/{address} returns correct can_spin, prizes array, hours_remaining
✓ POST /api/spin-wheel/spin executes spin with weighted random selection, returns prize with prize_index
✓ 24h cooldown enforced - returns 429 on second spin attempt within 24h
✓ Points prizes correctly update player.points balance
✓ Extra lives prizes correctly update player.extra_treats_balance
✓ Frontend FAB button visible at bottom-right (data-testid=spin-wheel-fab), bounces when spin available
✓ Canvas-based wheel renders 9 colorful segments with prize labels
✓ Spin button (data-testid=spin-button) shows 'SPIN NOW!' or 'Next spin in Xh' based on cooldown
✓ Prize legend grid shows all 9 prizes with icons and colors
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_spin_wheel.py (NEW - 9 test cases for Spin Wheel feature)
test_credentials: test_spin_agent and unique timestamped addresses used for spin tests
seed_data_creation: Unique test addresses created per test run to ensure fresh spin state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spin Wheel feature fully tested and working. Backend stores spin history in 'spin_wheel_history' collection and buffs in 'spin_wheel_buffs'. Uses weighted random selection for prizes. Frontend uses canvas-based wheel rendering. The FAB button at bottom-right bounces when a free spin is available (pulseReady state). 24h cooldown is enforced both on backend (429 response) and frontend (button shows 'Next spin in Xh'). Regression tests confirm auto-mixer subscription and treat creation endpoints still work.

tests_passed: execute spin returns prize with index

reward_application.details: Points and extra_lives prizes update player data correctly

components: spin-wheel-fab: Floating gift button at bottom-right, bounces when available
spin-wheel-modal: Modal with backdrop blur, wheel canvas, spin button, prize legend
spin-button: Shows 'SPIN NOW!' or 'Next spin in Xh'
spin-prize-result: Displays won prize after spin (when applicable)
